completed_tournaments.notes: Back-to-back Big South titles; second consecutive NCAA Tournament
First NCAA Tournament appearance in program history
Back-to-back Sun Belt titles; fourth NCAA Tournament in program history
First NCAA Tournament appearance since 2023; upset over No. 1 seed ETSU
LIU clinched auto-bid in semifinals because Mercyhurst is not NCAA tournament eligible
First NCAA Tournament appearance since 2001; coach Speedy Claxton emotional postgame
27th consecutive NCAA Tournament; final WCC tournament before move to Pac-12
First NCAA Tournament appearance since 1990; stunning 36-year drought ended

quarterfinal_details.duke_fsu: Isaiah Evans scored career-high 32 points (7 three-pointers), Cameron Boozer had 23 pts/10 reb. Duke rallied from 8 down in second half. Duke played only 7 players — Caleb Foster (foot fracture, had surgery) and Patrick Ngongba II (foot soreness) both out.
quarterfinal_details.clemson_unc: Nick Davidson scored 17 for Clemson. Henri Veesar led UNC with 28 points. UNC's last-ditch 3-pointer from beyond halfcourt with 2.7 seconds left didn't fall. Clemson wins 80-79.
quarterfinal_details.miami_louisville: Miami advances to face Virginia in semifinals.

semifinals_march_13: Semifinal 1 (7 PM ESPN): No. 2 Virginia vs No. 3 Miami
Semifinal 2 (9:30 PM ESPN): No. 1 Duke vs No. 5 Clemson
ACC.semifinal_notes: Virginia beat Miami 86-83 in regular season meeting (Feb 21). Duke's short 7-man rotation due to Foster/Ngongba injuries could be a problem on short rest against deep Clemson team.

quarterfinals_march_12: No. 5 Iowa State 75, No. 4 Texas Tech 53

quarterfinal_details.houston_byu: Kingston Flemings scored team-high 17 for Houston. AJ Dybantsa became leading scorer in single Big 12 tournament history for BYU but it wasn't enough. BYU was playing their 3rd game in 3 days.
quarterfinal_details.kansas_tcu: Darryn Peterson played 37 minutes, scored 24 points and grabbed 7 rebounds to lead Kansas.

semifinals_march_13: Semifinal 1 (7 PM ESPN/ESPN2): No. 1 Arizona vs No. 5 Iowa State
Semifinal 2 (9:30 PM ESPN/ESPN2): No. 2 Houston vs No. 3 Kansas
Big_12.notes: All four top-half seeds advance. Iowa State seeking three-peat as Big 12 tournament champion.

second_round_details.ole_miss_georgia: Ole Miss rallied late to defeat Georgia 76-72, continuing their surprising tournament run as a 15-seed.
second_round_details.oklahoma_texasam: Nijel Pack led Oklahoma with 20 points. Oklahoma won its 6th straight game against an SEC opponent. Dominant first half.
second_round_details.kentucky_missouri: Kentucky continues dark horse run with back-to-back wins.

quarterfinals_march_13: Game 9 (1 PM ESPN): No. 1 Florida vs No. 9 Kentucky
Game 10 (after Game 9, ESPN): No. 4 Vanderbilt vs No. 5 Tennessee
Game 11 (7 PM SEC Network): No. 2 Alabama vs No. 15 Ole Miss
Game 12 (after Game 11, SEC Network): No. 3 Arkansas vs No. 11 Oklahoma

third_round_details.ucla_rutgers: Donovan Dent recorded first triple-double in Big Ten tournament history: 10 pts, 10 reb, 12 ast.

quarterfinals_march_13: Game 11 (12 PM BTN): No. 1 Michigan vs No. 8 Ohio State
Game 12 (after Game 11, BTN): No. 4 Illinois vs No. 5 Wisconsin
Game 13 (6:30 PM BTN): No. 2 Nebraska vs No. 7 Purdue
Game 14 (after Game 13, BTN): No. 3 Michigan State vs No. 6 UCLA

quarterfinal_details.st_johns_providence: Ejiofor and Hopkins led St. John's.
quarterfinal_details.georgetown_villanova: UPSET: 11-seed Georgetown (16-17) knocked off 3-seed Villanova (24-8). Julius Halaifonua had 21 pts/10 reb. Kayvaun Mulready went 5-5 from the field (14 pts). Jeremiah Williams added 14 pts. Georgetown's first semifinal since 2021.
quarterfinal_details.seton_hall_creighton: Seton Hall advances, keeping alive slim at-large hopes.

semifinals_march_13: Semifinal 1 (5:30 PM Fox): No. 1 St. John's vs No. 4 Seton Hall
Semifinal 2 (8 PM FS1): No. 2 UConn vs No. 11 Georgetown
Big_East.notes: St. John's-UConn rematch possible in final. Georgetown's Cinderella run continues.

quarterfinals_march_12: No. 1 Utah State 80, No. 8 Wyoming 60 (via UNLV)
No. 3 San Diego State 71, No. 6 Fresno State 62 (via Colorado State)

quarterfinal_details.utah_state_unlv: Mason Falslev led Utah State with 24 pts/9 reb. MJ Collins added 20 pts. Utah State cruised.
quarterfinal_details.sdsu_colorado_state: San Diego State advances with 71-62 win.
quarterfinal_details.nevada_grand_canyon: Nevada set MW Tournament record for made free throws with 36 in the game.

semifinals_march_13: Semifinal 1 (6:30 PM PT, CBSSN): No. 1 Utah State vs No. 5 Nevada
Semifinal 2 (9 PM PT, CBSSN): No. 3 San Diego State vs TBD

second_round_march_12: No. 13 St. Bonaventure 63, No. 5 George Mason 57
quarterfinals_march_13: Game 7 (11:30 AM USA): No. 1 Saint Louis vs No. 9 George Washington
Game 8 (2 PM USA): No. 13 St. Bonaventure vs No. 4 Dayton
Game 9 (5 PM USA): No. 2 VCU vs No. 7 Duquesne
Game 10 (7:30 PM CNBC): No. 6 Davidson vs No. 3 Saint Joseph's
Atlantic_10.notes: Saint Louis and VCU shared A-10 regular season title. VCU is a bubble team — needs to win tournament or hope for chaos.

semifinals_march_13: Sam Houston vs Kennesaw State (3 PM CBSSN)

first_round_march_12: UMass 87, No. 1 Miami (OH) 83 — MAJOR UPSET: 31-0 Miami (OH) falls
MAC.notes: Miami (OH) entered as nation's only unbeaten team at 31-0. Stunning first-round exit.

America_East.notes: UMBC vs Vermont projected for championship

Ivy_League.venue: Newman Arena at Bartels Hall, Ithaca, NY

bubble_watch.resume_notes: Lost ACC quarterfinal to Virginia 74-81. Season done. Most projections still have them safely in as a play-in team.
Lost SEC first round to Ole Miss 66-76. Season done. Weak bubble provides cover.
WCC runner-up (lost 68-79 to Gonzaga). Strong 26-7 season. Most projections have them comfortably in.
Lost SEC second round to Kentucky 72-78. Done for the year. Weak bubble keeps them in.
Lost Big 12 quarterfinal to Arizona 59-81. Had passed into lock status before quarterfinal loss.
Lost ACC second round to Louisville 58-62. Season done. No resume boost. Anxiously awaiting Selection Sunday.
Won 13 of last 14. A-10 tournament quarterfinal vs Duquesne on March 13. Winning A-10 tournament would clinch auto-bid. At-large hopes alive but fragile.
Advanced to Big East semis after beating Creighton 72-61. Faces St. John's in semifinal. Only 16% at-large chances. Needs to win Big East tournament for auto-bid.
Lost to Tennessee 62-72 in SEC second round. Season done. At-large hopes effectively dead.
Lost Big Ten tournament game. At-large hopes dead.
Needs Mountain West tournament run or bid-stealer chaos.
Lost ACC first round to Pitt 63-64. At-large case dead.
Lost ACC second round to Wake Forest in OT. Resume insufficient.
Big 12 bubble team. Needs significant chaos.
Advanced in MW tournament (beat Colorado State/Fresno State). Needs to win MW tournament for auto-bid.
Blew out Texas A&M 83-63 in SEC second round. Faces Arkansas in quarterfinal. 6-game SEC win streak but still long shot for at-large.
Lost ACC second round to Florida State 89-95. At-large case effectively over.

projected_field_changes_from_march_12.reason: Beat Creighton 72-61 in Big East QF. Still only 16% at-large probability but now has a path to auto-bid through the Big East tournament. Faces St. John's in semis.
Lost to Clemson 79-80 in ACC QF. Resume strong enough to stay safely in field. Seeding may drop slightly.
Upset Villanova 78-64 in Big East QF as 11-seed (16-17 record). No at-large chance but alive for Big East auto-bid. Faces UConn in semifinal.
Dominant 83-63 win over Texas A&M. 6-game SEC win streak. Still long shot for at-large but resume improving. Faces Arkansas in QF.

lunardi_espn.notes: Lunardi shifted UConn back to 4th No. 1 seed over Florida in latest update. Duke (29-2) remains No. 1 overall. All three top seeds are two-loss teams; UConn is 27-3.

other_sources.notes: Most other bracketologists still have Florida as 4th No. 1 seed. UConn/Florida race will be decided by conference tournament results this weekend.

key_seeding_notes: Michigan locked as No. 2 overall with Big Ten title
Arizona locked as No. 3 overall with Big 12 title (16-2 conference)
UConn/Florida battling for 4th No. 1 seed — Lunardi now favors UConn, most others still have Florida
St. John's has Big East regular season title; could cement 2-seed with tournament title
Iowa State could improve seeding with Big 12 tournament run (seeking three-peat)
Duke's injuries (Foster fracture, Ngongba out) are biggest X-factor for top overall seed entering NCAA Tournament

key_storylines_march_13: Duke survives Florida State 80-79 without Foster (foot fracture, had surgery) and Ngongba (foot soreness) — played only 7 players. Isaiah Evans erupts for 32 points (7 threes). Title hopes now face health questions.
UNC falls to Clemson 80-79 on late-game heartbreak — last-second 3 from beyond halfcourt doesn't fall
Georgetown (16-17, 11-seed) upsets Villanova 78-64 in Big East quarterfinals — first semifinal since 2021
Ole Miss continues stunning SEC run as 15-seed, beating Georgia 76-72 to set up Alabama quarterfinal
Oklahoma blows out Texas A&M 83-63 for 6th straight SEC win — Nijel Pack with 20 points
BYU's AJ Dybantsa becomes leading scorer in single Big 12 tournament history but BYU falls to Houston 73-66
Kansas advances behind Darryn Peterson's 24 pts/7 reb — Big 12 semis: Arizona-Iowa State, Houston-Kansas
Donovan Dent records FIRST triple-double in Big Ten tournament history (10/10/12) for UCLA
Nevada sets MW Tournament record with 36 made free throws in 84-80 win over Grand Canyon
UMass shocks unbeaten Miami (OH) 87-83 in MAC first round — Miami was 31-0
Seton Hall stays alive on bubble with 72-61 win over Creighton — faces St. John's in Big East semifinal
Big East semis set: St. John's vs Seton Hall, UConn vs Georgetown
Big 12 semis set: Arizona vs Iowa State, Houston vs Kansas — all top-half seeds advance
SEC quarterfinals: Florida-Kentucky (dark horse), Alabama-Ole Miss (Cinderella), Arkansas-Oklahoma, Vanderbilt-Tennessee
Big Ten quarterfinals: Michigan-Ohio State, Illinois-Wisconsin, Nebraska-Purdue, Michigan State-UCLA
2 days until Selection Sunday — 16 auto-bids still to be decided

caleb_foster.timeline: Out for foreseeable future. Will miss ACC Tournament. NCAA Tournament availability uncertain.
caleb_foster.notes: Suffered fracture in win vs UNC. Used knee scooter on sideline.

patrick_ngongba_ii.timeline: Hopeful to return for NCAA Tournament per coach Scheyer.
patrick_ngongba_ii.notes: Had own boot and scooter. Being held out as precaution.

duke_injury_update.impact: Duke used only 7 players in 80-79 win over FSU. Short rotation is major concern for deep tournament run.
